allow: Bash(netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name="Next.js Dev")

Bash(npx tauri init --app-name MindfulPrompter --window-title "MindfulPrompter" --frontend-dist ../out --dev-url http://localhost:3000 --before-dev-command "npm run dev" --before-build-command "npm run build")
